text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop in on Symboli Rudolf to arrange our next
training session, but she seems a little under the
weather.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Just a headache, nothing more. All it needs is
time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
More to the point, there is a mountain of work to
do before the end of the day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have reference documents to compile for this
week's budget meeting, requisition forms to
approve, and more besides...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like to get it all out of the way as quickly
as possible, but... Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for this headache, I would be done by
now. Nothing can ever be simple, it seems...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Symboli Rudolf's headache is
causing her more trouble than she's willing to
admit.
